description: Hand-authored display metadata for FIRST-PARTY skill packs. `generate-packs-json` reads this + skills.json and emits packs.json (the catalog the dashboard reads). ONE grouping: a skill's pack IS its `category` (one line in its SKILL.md frontmatter) — there is no separate axis. Each pack below claims the skills whose category equals its `category` key. `core` and `basics` are the two packs shown by default (locked always-on) on the dashboard — see DEFAULT_VISIBLE_PACKS in apps/dashboard/lib/constants.ts. `lab` (category `other`) is the catch-all for skills with a missing/unknown category. Community packs live separately in skill-packs.json.

packs.name: Core
packs.description: What makes Aeon different from a cron job: it evolves its own skills, heals itself, coordinates a fleet of instances, and takes autonomous on-chain action. Shown by default and not removable.

packs.name: Basics
packs.description: Simple, immediately-runnable skills — point them at a topic, repo, token, or tx and get a useful result with little or no setup. Shown by default alongside Core.

packs.name: Dev & Code
packs.description: GitHub and repo automation: PR/issue triage, review, merges, releases, changelogs, repo health and ecosystem mapping.

packs.name: Crypto & Markets
packs.description: Token, DeFi, and prediction-market monitoring plus on-chain investigation: price/volume alerts, activity, narrative tracking, market context, and token/tx forensics.

packs.name: Research & Content
packs.description: Digests, deep research, trend and framework tracking, paper/HN/RSS/Reddit/Telegram summaries — turn a firehose of sources into signal.

packs.name: Social & Writing
packs.description: Drafting and distribution: tweets/threads, replies, syndication, campaigns, and engagement.

packs.name: Productivity
packs.description: Personal ops: routines, goal/idea capture and validation, retrospectives, deal flow, and follow-ups.

packs.name: Agent Ops
packs.description: Aeon's instrumentation: skill analytics/health/graphing, capability mapping, spend monitoring, memory housekeeping, fork health, and registry tooling.

packs.name: Onchain Security
packs.description: On-chain forensics and risk: rug/honeypot/LP-lock checks, contract and approval audits, deployer tracing, fund-flow and wallet clustering.

packs.name: Lab
packs.description: Unsorted skills — freshly authored or imported skills whose category isn't a known pack yet. Set their category to file them. Catch-all: keeps adding a skill from ever breaking the catalog.
